task-auth-001.description: Add Supabase client dependency to web app
acceptanceCriteria: @supabase/supabase-js is added to apps/web/package.json dependencies
bun install succeeds without errors
Supabase types are available for import

task-auth-002.description: Create IAuthService interface and auth types
acceptanceCriteria: IAuthService interface exports signUp, signIn, signOut, getSession, onAuthStateChange methods
AuthUser type defined with id, email fields
AuthSession type defined with user, accessToken fields
AuthResult type defined with success/error union
Interface has no runtime imports (types only)
SupabaseAuthService implements IAuthService interface
Constructor accepts supabaseUrl and supabaseAnonKey
signUp calls supabase.auth.signUp and returns AuthResult
signIn calls supabase.auth.signInWithPassword and returns AuthResult
signOut calls supabase.auth.signOut
getSession returns current session or null
onAuthStateChange subscribes to auth changes and returns unsubscribe function
MockAuthService implements IAuthService interface
Stores users in memory Map
signUp adds user to map and returns success
signIn validates credentials against map
signOut clears current session
onAuthStateChange accepts callback and returns unsubscribe
Provides reset() method to clear state between tests

task-auth-005.description: Create auth domain store with MST models and enhancement hooks
acceptanceCriteria: createAuthStore factory function exported
AuthSession MST model matches schema (id, userId, email, status, error)
enhanceModels adds isAuthenticated view (status === 'authenticated')
enhanceModels adds displayName view (email or 'Guest')
enhanceRootStore adds initialize action that recovers session via authService.getSession
enhanceRootStore adds signUp, signIn, signOut actions that update AuthSession
Actions set status to 'loading' during operations
Actions handle errors and set error field
src/auth/index.ts exports IAuthService, AuthUser, AuthSession, AuthResult types
src/auth/index.ts exports SupabaseAuthService, MockAuthService
src/auth/index.ts exports createAuthStore
src/index.ts re-exports auth module

task-auth-007.description: Create React auth context provider and useAuth hook
acceptanceCriteria: AuthProvider component creates and provides auth store
AuthProvider initializes store on mount (calls initialize action)
AuthProvider sets up onAuthStateChange subscription
AuthProvider cleans up subscription on unmount
useAuth hook returns auth store with typed access
useAuth throws if used outside AuthProvider
Unit4.tsx component created with observer wrapper
Shows signup form when unauthenticated (email, password, confirm password)
Shows login form when unauthenticated (email, password)
Displays loading state during auth operations
Shows error messages when auth fails
Shows authenticated user info when logged in (email, user ID)
Logout button visible when authenticated
Route added to app router at /unit4
.env.example created with VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY placeholders
vite.config.ts exposes env variables to client
AuthProvider reads credentials from import.meta.env
App fails gracefully with clear error if credentials missing
